problem id: ec2e58ea
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01010100 -> 10000000
  10111001 -> 00100001
  01111000 -> 00000000
  10010001 -> 00100001
  01101110 -> 11000000
  01100001 -> 00100000
  10111010 -> 01000001
  01100101 -> 10100000
  10100001 -> 00100001
  10001010 -> 01000001

query: 01010101
predicted answer: 10100000
